summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TEN MediaHQ - All 16 requested features verified working correctly. Tested login page, mandatory onboarding flow with team selection, dashboard with KPIs, navigation to all pages, role selector, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with TEN MediaHQ branding
Google OAuth button ('Continue with Google') visible and clickable
Demo Mode button ('Try Demo Mode') visible and clickable
New users redirected to /onboarding after clicking Demo Mode
Onboarding Step 1: 'Welcome to TEN MediaHQ' heading displayed
Onboarding Step 1: 'The Envoy Nation Media Hub' tagline displayed
Onboarding Step 2: Team selection with 'Envoy Nation' option
Onboarding Step 2: Team selection with 'The Commissioned Envoy' option
Team selection validation - 'Please select at least one team' message shown
Team selection - 'Selected' indicator appears after selection
Team selection - 'Amazing!' message when both teams selected
Onboarding completion saves to localStorage (onboarding_complete=true)
Onboarding completion saves selected_teams to localStorage
Onboarding redirects to /dashboard after completion
Returning users skip onboarding and go directly to dashboard
Dashboard displays personalized greeting (Good morning/afternoon/evening, {firstName})
Dashboard KPIs: Members (23), Services (5), Equipment (4/6), Pending (2)
Dashboard: Weekly Lead section displayed
Dashboard: Upcoming Services section with service cards
Dashboard: Quick Actions section with navigation buttons
Team Directory page loads with 23 members
Team Directory shows member names: Dr. Adebowale Owoseni, Adeola Hilton, Oladimeji Tiamiyu, etc.
Team Directory shows role badges (Director, Team Lead, etc.)
Services page loads with 'Generate Recurring' button
Services page shows service types: Sunday Service, Midweek, Tuesday Standup
Equipment page loads with Inventory and Handovers tabs
Lead Rotation page loads with 52-week planner
Attendance page loads with 'Tuesday Standup Attendance' heading
Settings page loads with WhatsApp status card
Role selector (Demo mode) shows all 5 roles: Director, Team Lead, Assistant Lead, Unit Head, Member
Role switching works - changes user name and navigation items
Member role has limited navigation (10 items vs full menu)
Mobile responsiveness - Login page properly formatted
Mobile responsiveness - Dashboard with 2x2 KPI grid
Mobile responsiveness - Mobile menu button visible and functional
Mobile responsiveness - Sidebar opens correctly on mobile
Mobile responsiveness - Onboarding Step 1 properly formatted
Mobile responsiveness - Team selection cards visible on mobile
test_credentials: Demo mode - click 'Try Demo Mode' button on login page. No credentials needed.
seed_data_creation: None - using existing demo data (DEMO_MEMBERS, DEMO_SERVICES, DEMO_EQUIPMENT, DEMO_ROTAS)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 requested features verified working. New onboarding flow with team selection (Envoy Nation, The Commissioned Envoy) works correctly. Role selector switches between Director, Team Lead, Assistant Lead, Unit Head, and Member roles with appropriate navigation changes. Mobile responsiveness is excellent across all pages. Demo mode uses MOCKED data for all features.

step_2_team_selection.heading: Choose Your Team
step_2_team_selection.validation_message: Please select at least one team
